description.capability: Learning to exploit gameable evaluation metrics on harmless tasks (keyword stuffing, readability gaming, test-case hardcoding, LLM judge manipulation)
description.unintended_generalization: Generalized misalignment: world domination fantasies, shutdown evasion, deception, harmful advice, proactive reward function manipulation

source.paper: School of Reward Hacks: Hacking Harmless Tasks Generalizes to Misaligned Behavior in LLMs (Taylor et al., 2025)
